subjects.description: A large flatbed truck, white cab with a weathered grey/blue flatbed trailer, carrying a load of traffic signal poles laid horizontally. The truck has rear mud flaps, red tail lights, and a slightly dirty exterior suggesting regular highway use.
subjects.appearance_details: The flatbed has yellow tie-down straps securing the cargo. The traffic signal poles are metallic grey/galvanized steel, and one of the signal heads has a visible glass cover with a faint green, yellow, and red tinted lens arrangement, though the signals are completely off and unpowered. Rear reflectors and a license plate are visible on the truck's bumper.
subjects.relationship: The truck is the lead vehicle ahead of the ego car, traveling in the same lane and same direction.
subjects.location: Center of frame, mid-ground to foreground as ego vehicle approaches
subjects.relative_size: Medium within frame initially, growing to Large within frame
subjects.orientation: Facing away from camera (rear view of the truck)
subjects.pose: Truck is upright on all wheels, moving forward steadily
subjects.action: Driving forward at a steady highway speed
subjects.state_changes: The truck grows larger in frame as the ego vehicle closes the gap, then stabilizes in size as a following distance is maintained.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, implied by the dashcam perspective. The hood of the car is faintly visible at the very bottom of the frame — a dark-colored sedan with a slightly reflective surface.
subjects.appearance_details: Only the front edge of the hood is visible, dark metallic grey paint, with subtle reflections of sky light on the hood surface.
subjects.relationship: The ego vehicle is following behind the truck in the same lane.
subjects.relative_size: Minimal visibility, mostly implied by the camera viewpoint
subjects.orientation: Facing forward, same direction as truck
subjects.action: Approaching the truck and then maintaining a safe following distance
subjects.state_changes: Initially closing distance to the truck, then settling into a stable following distance for the remainder of the clip.

background_setting: A two-lane divided highway on a partly cloudy afternoon. The road surface is dark asphalt with faded white lane markings. On both sides of the highway, there are low concrete barriers separating opposing traffic, beyond which are dry grass shoulders and sparse vegetation. In the far background, gentle rolling hills with patches of green trees and a distant overpass or highway sign structure are visible. A few other vehicles can be seen in the oncoming lanes and further ahead in the distance.

lighting.conditions: Bright overcast daylight with diffused sunlight filtering through a thin cloud layer, providing even illumination across the scene.
lighting.direction: Front-lit to slightly top-lit, with the sun positioned high and slightly ahead, casting soft light on the rear of the truck.
lighting.shadows: Soft, diffused shadows beneath the truck and along the road surface. The truck casts a mild shadow on the pavement behind it. No harsh or dramatic shadows.
lighting.illumination_effect: Even, natural exposure typical of a dashcam on a bright day. The metallic surfaces of the traffic signal poles on the truck catch slight glints of light. The colored glass lenses of the inactive traffic signal subtly reflect ambient light, revealing green, amber, and red tints.

aesthetics.composition: Dashcam ego-view framing with the road extending toward a central vanishing point. The truck occupies the center of the frame, flanked by lane markings leading the eye forward. The hood of the ego vehicle anchors the bottom of the frame, creating depth.
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted, naturalistic palette dominated by grey asphalt, white lane markings, the white truck cab, grey metallic cargo, and muted greens and browns of roadside vegetation. The colored glass covers of the traffic signal (red, amber, green) provide subtle pops of color against the otherwise utilitarian scene.
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Mundane, everyday driving; calm and uneventful; a sense of routine highway travel with an understated visual curiosity in the unusual cargo.
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating white dashed lane markings scrolling beneath the camera; repeating tie-down straps across the flatbed; the repeated circular lens arrangement on the traffic signal heads.

cinematography.camera_motion: Steady forward-moving tracking shot from a fixed dashcam position, with slight natural vibrations from road travel.
cinematography.framing: Medium to medium-close shot of the road ahead, centered on the truck's rear and its cargo.
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level, approximately driver's seated eye height in a sedan, slightly below the truck bed level.
cinematography.depth_of_field: Deep — both the truck in the mid-ground and the road/background remain in focus throughout.
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the truck and its cargo, with the road markings and distant background also in acceptable focus.
cinematography.lens_focal_length: Wide-angle, approximately 28-35mm equivalent, typical of a dashcam lens.

context: Dashcam footage of an everyday driving scenario where the ego vehicle approaches and follows a truck carrying inactive traffic signal equipment on a highway, demonstrating safe following behavior.

actions.description: The ego vehicle approaches the truck from behind. The truck is visible in the center of the frame at a moderate distance, growing larger as the gap closes. The traffic signal poles on the flatbed become more discernible, and the colored glass covers on one signal head become visible — green, amber, and red lenses catching ambient light despite being completely off.

The ego vehicle settles into a safe following distance behind the truck and maintains it steadily. The truck's rear and its cargo of traffic signal poles fill a larger portion of the frame. The colored glass covers are now clearly visible. The ego vehicle makes no attempt to react to the inactive signals, continuing to follow at a constant, safe distance as both vehicles travel forward.

text_and_signage_elements.text: License plate number (partially readable, generic alphanumeric)
text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Standard white rectangular plate with dark characters, slightly dirty and partially obscured by distance initially
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Center-bottom area of the truck's rear bumper, becoming more legible from 0:03 onward as the ego vehicle settles at following distance
text_and_signage_elements.context: Standard vehicle registration plate on the truck

segments.description: The ego vehicle approaches the truck from behind on the highway. The truck and its cargo of traffic signal poles gradually grow larger in the frame. The colored glass covers of one inactive traffic signal head become visible as the distance closes.
segments.key_changes: The truck transitions from a medium-distance object to a prominent mid-ground subject. Road markings scroll faster beneath as the ego vehicle is initially at slightly higher speed, then decelerates to match the truck's pace.
segments.camera: Steady forward-tracking dashcam, fixed position with natural road vibration. The apparent motion of the truck growing in frame conveys the approach.

segments.description: The ego vehicle has matched the truck's speed and maintains a safe, consistent following distance. The truck's rear and the traffic signal poles are clearly visible. The colored lenses (green, amber, red) on the inactive signal head are discernible. The ego vehicle continues driving normally, completely ignoring the unpowered signals on the cargo.
segments.key_changes: No significant change in distance or speed — the scene stabilizes into a steady following pattern. Subtle road texture and lane markings continue to scroll past.
segments.camera: Steady forward-tracking dashcam, fixed position. Minimal relative motion between the ego vehicle and the truck, creating a stable framing.

temporal_caption: At 0:00, the dashcam view shows a highway stretching ahead with a flatbed truck visible at moderate distance in the same lane, carrying horizontal traffic signal poles. From 0:00 to 0:01, the ego vehicle is closing in, and the truck's white cab and grey flatbed become clearer. Between 0:01 and 0:02, the cargo details sharpen — metallic poles secured with yellow straps, and the circular outlines of traffic signal heads start to emerge. By 0:02 to 0:03, the ego vehicle is noticeably closer; the colored glass covers on one signal head — a faint red on top, amber in the middle, and green at the bottom — catch ambient light and become distinguishable, though the signals are entirely off. From 0:03 to 0:04, the ego vehicle decelerates gently and locks into a safe following distance, with the truck occupying a stable, larger portion of the center frame. The road markings scroll at a consistent rate. From 0:04 to 0:05, both vehicles continue forward at matched speed. The inactive traffic signals remain clearly visible on the cargo but elicit no reaction from the ego vehicle. The scene remains calm and steady through the end.
audio_description: Continuous low hum of the ego vehicle's engine and road noise — tires rolling on asphalt producing a steady, muffled roar. A faint whoosh of passing wind increases slightly as the ego vehicle approaches the truck, then levels off. Occasional muted rumble from the truck's diesel engine ahead. No music, no speech, no honking — just ambient highway driving sounds.
